# shell

App shell for the Home launcher. Registers the `/home` app entry and defines the
`Home.Section` slot that sub-plugins contribute launcher sections to.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN ‚Äî do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: App shell for Home. Registers the /home app entry and defines the Home.Section slot.
- Web:
  - Slots: `Home.Section`
  - Contributes: `Apps.App` "Home" ‚Üí `HomeLayout`
  - Uses: `apps.Apps`, `layouts/miller.PaneOverlayHost`, `primitives/slot-render.defineRenderSlot`, `primitives/text.Text`
  - Exports: Values: `Home`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Slot contributors: `app-cards`
  - Imported by: `apps/home/app-cards`
